paper_title: MultiPL-E: A Scalable and Polyglot Approach to Benchmarking Neural Code Generation
evaluation_method: Same methodology as MultiPL-E. Translates unit-test-driven Python benchmarks (HumanEval and MBPP) to 18 other programming languages. Generated code samples are executed against predefined unit tests. The unbiased pass@k estimator is used to measure functional correctness: pass@k = 1 - C(n-c, k) / C(n, k) where n is total samples and c is number passing. Primary reported metric is pass@1.
